div1.entryFree:
Stall, subst. 1) the part of a stable in which a horse or an ox is kept: Shr. II, 360. H4A V, 2, 14 (feed like oxen at a s.). Mcb. II, 4, 16.
2) a small shed in which an occupation is carried on: work for bread upon Athenian --s, Mids. III, 2, 10. --s, bulks, windows, are smothered up, Cor. II, 1, 226.
